/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN & SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/BWDNC/SAWD/LDPX:03-28-22 (60)/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 03-02-22/DOP/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 03-09-22/DOP/TE: 90 MIN/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYED AND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND STAYED TO02-16-22/X:BAIL SET AT $10000/

/CAL: HEARING ON DA MOTION TO DETAIN/MO DENIED/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLYWITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THEDEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONSAT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X: NOT POSSES INCENDIARY DEVICESOR LIGHTERS/SA2: ARTMAR HOTEL 433 ELLIS ST, SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD/X: FUTUREDATE IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: D,A, MOTION TO DETAIN & SEALING ORDER IS FILED,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 02-09-22/X: THE 60TH CALENDAR DAY IS 03-28-22,/NB/X: BAIL SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/CONTD: HEARING ON DA MOTION TODETAIN/DOP/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 90 MIN/
/CAL:PHC/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:25,000/NIGHTSERV/X:CASE IS NOW ON LOVE WAIVER STATUS/VD:03-09-22 HEARING/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT STAY/BWLIFT: 02-08-22/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/X: NO CITE/BAIL:10000/X: LOVE WAIVER/BWNUM:1ST/NIGHTSERV/
